backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (InfluencerApplication, BrandInquiry, Campaign, UserProfile) and backend logic for user approval, profile management, influencer/brand submissions, campaign management, and admin operations with access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (navbar, hero section, how-it-works, services, etc.) to their corresponding source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of key frontend files including React Query hooks, AdminDashboard page, global CSS, and Tailwind config.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark modes covering background, foreground, primary, accent, chart, and sidebar color variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the GrowthBridge Media React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes the full page layout (Navbar, HeroSection, StatsSection, forms, Footer) and conditionally renders the AdminDashboard and ProfileSetupModal based on authentication and admin state.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Displays a full-screen access denied message with a shield icon and an optional back button for unauthorized admin dashboard access attempts.
frontend/src/components/BrandInquiryForm: Form component for brand campaign inquiries with fields for brand name, industry, contact, budget, goal, and timeline, including client-side validation and a success modal on submission.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with the GrowthBridge Media logo, social media links, categorized navigation links, a contact CTA section with scroll-to-form buttons, and a copyright notice.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Renders the landing page hero section with a headline, subtext, and two CTA buttons (Join as Influencer, Work With Us as a Brand) that smooth-scroll to their respective forms, plus decorative background blobs and social-proof avatars.
frontend/src/components/HowItWorksSectio: Displays a two-column 'How It Works' section with numbered step cards for both Brands and Influencers, using teal and amber accent colors respectively.
frontend/src/components/InfluencerApplic: A validated multi-field form for influencer applications that collects profile details (name, Instagram handle, niche, engagement rate, etc.) and submits them via a React Query mutation, showing a success modal on completion.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: A fixed responsive navbar with smooth-scroll navigation links, active section highlighting via IntersectionObserver, Internet Identity login/logout, and an admin panel toggle button.
frontend/src/components/PricingSection.t: Renders a three-tier pricing section (Starter, Professional, Enterprise) all based on a 20% commission model, with a highlighted 'Most Popular' card and a CTA that scrolls to the contact section.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that collects a new user's name and email, validates the inputs, and submits them via the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` mutation to set up their profile.
A landing-page section that displays two columns of service cards—one for brands and one for influencers—each with an icon, title, and description.
frontend/src/components/StatsSection.tsx: A statistics section that renders four animated counters (campaigns, influencers, brands, satisfaction) which count up when scrolled into view using IntersectionObserver.
frontend/src/components/SuccessModal.tsx: A reusable success confirmation modal with a checkmark icon, customizable title/message, ESC key support, and body scroll locking while open.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with the current Internet Identity and invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for the backend actor, covering user profiles, admin checks, influencer applications, brand inquiries, and campaigns with appropriate cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Tailwind layers and defines OKLCH-based design tokens (colors, radius, shadows) for both light and dark themes, plus base body and focus-visible styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Protected admin dashboard page with tabbed views for influencers, brands, campaigns, and stats; supports inline campaign deal-value editing and status updates via React Query hooks.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading URL query parameters (including hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the address bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that maps OKLCH CSS variables to semantic color tokens, extends theme with custom fonts, shadows, border radii, and accordion animations, and registers typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing GrowthBridge Media's architecture, existing features, known issues, and image requirements for build planning and continuity tracking.
